title: AN ACT AMENDING APPENDIX A, TITLE J, PROJECTS J-000.30 AND J-000.20 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5332 / 52 OG No. 8, 39027 (July 31, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1497, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING APPENDIX A, TITLE J, PROJECTS J-000.30 AND J-000.20 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Appendix A, Projects J-000.30 and J-000.20 of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven are amended by transferring all the figures opposite financing Method 130 from under Bacolod City to Dumaguete so that these items shall read as follows:

"J-000.30 Bacolod Cityâ

a. Bacolod City wharf:

J-000.20 Negros Orientalâ

Pier

RB: 600: (600): (300): (300)

130:300: 300 :300 : ...

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
